zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Grelley於大約1173年出生在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特時，他的父親Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester54歲，母親Isabel Basset52歲。他和Margaret Longchamp至少有1個兒子。他於1215年被列為surety 。他去世於1230年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Grelley于大约1173年出生在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特时，他的父亲Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester54岁，母亲Isabel Basset52岁。他和Margaret Longchamp至少有1个儿子。他于1215年被列为surety 。他去世于1230年在英国英格兰藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Grelley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Possibly an altered form of Irish   Crilly  .

variants.name: Crilly
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Raghailligh ‘son of Raghailleach’. Compare Crawley .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Grelley was born about 1173, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, his father, Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester, was 54 and his mother, Isabel Basset, was 52. He had at least 1 son with Margaret Longchamp. In 1215, at the age of 43, his occupation is listed as surety . He died in 1230, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Grelley est né environ 1173, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Isabel Basset, avait 52 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Margaret Longchamp. En 1215, à l’âge de 43 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est surety . Il est décédé en 1230, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Grelley um 1173 in Manchester, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester 54 und seine Mutter Isabel Basset 52. Er hatte mit Margaret Longchamp mindestens 1 Sohn. 1215, als er 43 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als surety  aufgeführt. Er starb 1230 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Grelley è nato il circa 1173 nel Manchester, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester, aveva 54 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Basset, aveva 52 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Margaret Longchamp. Nel 1215, all'età di 43 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come surety . Morì nel 1230, nel Manchester, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Grelleyが約1173年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで生まれた時，父Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchesterは54歳，母Isabel Bassetは52歳であった。彼はMargaret Longchampとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。1215年，43歳の時，職業はsurety と記録されている。彼は1230年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Grelley(이)가 대략 1173년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester(은)는 54세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Basset(은)는 52세였다. 그는 Margaret Longchamp(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1215년, 43세의 나이로 그의 직업은 surety 이었다. 그는 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Grelley nasceu aproximadamente 1173, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Basset, tinha 52 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Margaret Longchamp. Em 1215, com 43 anos, sua profissão aparece como surety . Ele faleceu em 1230, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Grelley родился около 1173 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel Basset, 52. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Margaret Longchamp. В 1215 году, в возрасте 43 лет,  он работал по профессии surety . Он умер в 1230 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Grelley nació aproximadamente 1173, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Albert "Juvenis" de Grelle, Baron of Manchester, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Isabel Basset, tenía 52 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Margaret Longchamp. En 1215, a la edad de 43 años, su ocupación registrada era surety . Murió en 1230, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años.
